query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A black and white head-and-shoulders portrait of a man with short dark hair and light facial stubble, wearing a dark jacket over a collared shirt. He faces forward, looking directly at the camera with a serious, intense expression. The image is rendered in high contrast monochrome.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white head-and-shoulders portrait of a man with short dark hair and light facial stubble, wearing a dark jacket over a collared shirt, looking directly at the camera with a serious, intense expression. The entire image is overlaid with dense horizontal scanlines that evoke degraded analog video or CRT display artifacts, creating a retro, mechanically worn texture across the subject's face and background.
